scripts.build:extension: node scripts/clean-extension-build.js && node scripts/generate-extension-manifest.js && node scripts/generate-extension-icons.js && vite build --config vite.extension.config.ts && vite build --config vite.extension.inpage.config.ts
scripts.build:extension:load: pnpm run build:extension && pnpm run prepare:extension
scripts.pages:deploy: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=boing-wallet
